subject: Project Management
title: Sprint Review
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Sprint Review.

hook.text: At the end of every sprint, the team shows working software to stakeholders. No slides.

buildup.text: The review is a live demo. Click the button. See the feature. Give feedback now.

discovery.text: Stakeholders finally see reality, not promises — and can redirect the product while it's cheap.

twist.text: Many teams turn the review into a presentation. The moment you add slides, you lose honesty.

climax.text: The Sprint Review closes the feedback loop — the thing waterfall never had.

punchline.text: Show the work. Skip the slides. Get real feedback.

quiz.question: What should a Sprint Review focus on?
options: Planning tasks for the next sprint
